head.title: Front porch stairs
head.description: Custom front porch stair restoration featuring mahogany treads and detailed balustrade work, built by Artisanal Restoration to replace aging stairs.

title: Front porch stairs get a makeover
summary:
Artisanal Restoration removed old decaying stairs, added a concrete foundation to prevent future decay from ground contact, and reframed the stringers and base plate with healthy wood.

The new structural framework was covered with beautiful mahogany treads, then topped off with a custom balustrade featuring beautiful finish carpentry details on the rail profile and newel post finials.
featuredImageAlt: A detail image of the finish carpentry on a fineal custom-built for a staircase in a Princeton, NJ home
overviewText:

overviewImageCaption: The completed stairs, showing a custom-build fineal with the freshly-stained staircase in the background
